script: Loop is a small, fast tracker for product teams. Here's a tour in under a minute. Sign in with your work email — no password to remember. Every project lives on one board. Todo, doing, done — the team's whole week, on one screen. Click any card to open the full ticket — description, status, comments, all in one place. One click marks a ticket as done. No status menus, no friction. Workspace settings are one click away — and that's the whole tour. Loop, in under a minute.
